General.Name: Sing Lee Software Group Ltd
General.Description: Sing Lee Software (Group) Limited, an investment holding company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in development and sale of information and network technologies and services to the financial industry in the People's Republic of China. It develops and sells software and hardware products. The company also provides technical support services. Sing Lee Software (Group) Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tower II, Silvercord, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
